data.current_description: Modify a saved query. Requires authorization.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing saved query identified by its ID. Requires bearer token authentication. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields in the request body will be modified. Returns the updated SavedQuery object with all current properties including the modification timestamp.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. data.current_description: Remove a saved query. Requires authorization.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a saved query identified by its ID. Requires bearer token authentication. This action cannot be undone. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion.

data.current_description: Save a DNS lookup query for later reference. Requires authorization.

data.current_description: Look up the published SPF record for a domain or validate an SPF record syntax.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a saved query by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a specific saved query by its unique identifier. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns the SavedQuery object containing the query type (DNS, WHOIS, or SPF), hostname, timestamp, and results from the original lookup. Only returns queries belonging to the authenticated user.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about whether it retrieves one or multiple queries. Description lacks critical details about the ID parameter, what data is returned, and access control. Enhanced summary to clarify single-query retrieval and expanded description to specify return schema, authentication requirements, and user-scoped access for better AI agent understanding.
